summary: A clip that intercuts spoken statements and on-screen text about activists and a vice mayor in relation to ICE officers. It includes screenshots of a website ('icelist.info'), TikTok screen-recordings of activists, and a talking-head of ICE Acting Director Todd Lyons speaking at a podium. It consists mostly of a long spoken statement, with no music track.
notable_text: Vice Mayor of the City of Cudahy, CA, Cynthia Gonzalez, calls for local gangs to unite against ICE; TikToker posts a video about murdering ICE agents; icelist.info; Security Specialist ICE; Identified, Role Identified, Texas
